chunks.section: NIRF Overview & NIRF 2026 + NIRF 2025 Document Links
chunks.context: This chunk explains what NIRF is, and provides all NIRF 2026 and NIRF 2025 submission document download links for MSAJCE covering Engineering, Overall, and Innovation categories.
chunks.text: National Institutional Ranking Framework (NIRF) — Overview: The National Institutional Ranking Framework (NIRF) is a methodology adopted by the Ministry of Education (MoE), Government of India, to rank institutions of higher education across the country. MSAJCE participates in NIRF rankings annually and submits data across three categories: Engineering, Overall, and Innovation. NIRF 2026 Documents: NIRF 2026 Engineering: https://www.msajce-edu.in/uploads/nift/MSAJCE-ENGG-2026.pdf. NIRF 2026 Overall: https://www.msajce-edu.in/uploads/nift/MSAJCE-OVERALL-2026.pdf. NIRF 2026 Innovation: https://www.msajce-edu.in/uploads/nift/MSAJCE-INNOV-2026.pdf. NIRF 2025 Documents: NIRF 2025 Engineering: https://www.msajce-edu.in/uploads/nift/MSAJCE-ENGG-2025.pdf. NIRF 2025 Overall: https://www.msajce-edu.in/uploads/nift/MSAJCE-OVERALL-2025.pdf. NIRF 2025 Innovation: https://www.msajce-edu.in/uploads/nift/MSAJCE-INNOV-2025.pdf.

chunks.section: NIRF 2024 & NIRF 2023 Document Links — Complete Year-wise Table
chunks.context: This chunk provides all NIRF 2024 and NIRF 2023 document download links for MSAJCE, and a complete consolidated year-wise table of all 10 NIRF documents from 2023 to 2026.
chunks.text: NIRF 2024 Documents: NIRF 2024 Engineering: https://www.msajce-edu.in/uploads/nift/MSAJCE-ENGG-2024.pdf. NIRF 2024 Overall: https://www.msajce-edu.in/uploads/nift/MSAJCE-OVERALL-2024.pdf. Note: NIRF 2024 does not have a separate Innovation submission listed on the page. NIRF 2023 Documents: NIRF 2023 Engineering: https://www.msajce-edu.in/uploads/nift/MSAJCE-ENGG-2023.pdf. NIRF 2023 Overall: https://www.msajce-edu.in/uploads/nift/MSAJCE-OVERALL-2023.pdf. Note: NIRF 2023 does not have a separate Innovation submission listed on the page. Complete Year-wise Summary of All NIRF Documents (2023-2026): Year 2026 — Engineering: https://www.msajce-edu.in/uploads/nift/MSAJCE-ENGG-2026.pdf | Overall: https://www.msajce-edu.in/uploads/nift/MSAJCE-OVERALL-2026.pdf | Innovation: https://www.msajce-edu.in/uploads/nift/MSAJCE-INNOV-2026.pdf. Year 2025 — Engineering: https://www.msajce-edu.in/uploads/nift/MSAJCE-ENGG-2025.pdf | Overall: https://www.msajce-edu.in/uploads/nift/MSAJCE-OVERALL-2025.pdf | Innovation: https://www.msajce-edu.in/uploads/nift/MSAJCE-INNOV-2025.pdf. Year 2024 — Engineering: https://www.msajce-edu.in/uploads/nift/MSAJCE-ENGG-2024.pdf | Overall: https://www.msajce-edu.in/uploads/nift/MSAJCE-OVERALL-2024.pdf | Innovation: Not listed. Year 2023 — Engineering: https://www.msajce-edu.in/uploads/nift/MSAJCE-ENGG-2023.pdf | Overall: https://www.msajce-edu.in/uploads/nift/MSAJCE-OVERALL-2023.pdf | Innovation: Not listed. Total documents available: 10 PDFs across 4 years.

chunks.section: Related Accreditation Links & General Contact Information
chunks.context: This chunk covers all related accreditation and compliance links (NAAC, IQAC, ARIIA, Mandatory Disclosure) that appear alongside the NIRF page, plus complete MSAJCE general contact details.
chunks.text: Related Accreditation & Compliance Links on NIRF Page: NAAC: https://www.msajce-edu.in/naac.php. IQAC: https://www.msajce-edu.in/iqac.php. NIRF: https://www.msajce-edu.in/nirf.php. ARIIA Certificate 2021: https://www.msajce-edu.in/uploads/ariia/ARIIA-2021-CERTIFICATE.pdf. Anna University Approval: https://www.msajce-edu.in/uploads/AnnaUnivApproval.pdf. AICTE Approval: https://www.msajce-edu.in/uploads/AICTE-APPROVAL.pdf. Code of Conduct: https://www.msajce-edu.in/uploads/naac/cdeofconduct.pdf. Best Practices: https://www.msajce-edu.in/uploads/naac/bestpractices.pdf. Mandatory Disclosure: http://msajce-edu.in/uploads/MandatoryDisclosure.pdf. Institutional Distinctiveness: http://msajce-edu.in/uploads/naac/7.3/7.3LH.pdf. Annual Report AY2023-2024: https://www.msajce-edu.in/uploads/aqar/AnnualReport2023-2024.pdf. Online Admission: https://enrollonline.co.in/Registration/Apply/MSAJCE. Online Fee Payment: https://www.feepayr.com/. College Management System: https://cims.mastersofterp.in/. ESE Timetable June 2025: https://www.msajce-edu.in/ESETT-June25.php. Exam Results: https://results.msajce-edu.in/. AICTE Scholarship Schemes: https://www.aicte.gov.in/schemes/students-development-schemes. Grievance Cell: https://www.msajce-edu.in/grievanceredressalcommittee.php. Email: grievance@msajce-edu.in. General Contact — MSAJCE: Address: 34, Rajiv Gandhi Salai (OMR), Siruseri IT Park, Siruseri, Chennai – 603103. Phone: +91 99400 04500. Email: msajce.office@gmail.com. Website: www.msajce-edu.in.

rows: 34, Rajiv Gandhi Salai (OMR), Siruseri IT Park, Siruseri, Chennai – 603103
